description: SendCanary DKIM setup (1 TXT record): publishes a DKIM public key as a TXT record under %selector%._domainkey.<your-domain>. Use this when your email provider hands you a TXT-style DKIM key rather than a CNAME - most commonly Google Workspace, Resend, Mailgun, Brevo, and Zoho Mail. DKIM is required for DMARC alignment and improves deliverability. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: selector: DKIM selector label prefixed to _domainkey (e.g. google, resend, mail, zmail). value: the full TXT record value your email provider gave you, typically 'v=DKIM1; k=rsa; p=<base64-public-key>'. Host becomes %selector%._domainkey.<your-domain>.
